description_long: This object consists of three rectangular tables, each with a distinct tabletop material: one with a speckled granite-like surface, one with a transparent glass top, and one with a warm-toned wooden top. All three tables are supported by robust, dark wooden trestle-style legs, giving them a sturdy and industrial appearance. The granite table features a light, speckled pattern, while the glass table is clear and modern, and the wooden table has a smooth, natural finish. The legs are constructed with cross-bracing for added stability and visual interest. The tables are arranged side by side, suggesting a modular or communal use, suitable for urban environments such as parks, plazas, or outdoor dining areas. There are no visible decorative elements beyond the material contrasts and structural design.
description: A set of three rectangular tables with granite, glass, and wood tops, each supported by sturdy, dark wooden trestle legs. The design is robust and modern, suitable for communal or urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three tables side by side, highlighting the different tabletop materials and the sturdy wooden trestle legs.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the thickness and material of each tabletop, with the granite table on the right, wood in the center, and glass on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the granite tabletop in the foreground, with the wood and glass tables receding behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the granite table on the left, wood in the center, and glass on the right, with clear visibility of the leg structures.
